TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Paga ksun o snalu dha sida qhuni apa dha mdngu qhuni thuun dha misan plahan. Sungu dha mhapuy uqun, 2 ka wahaw paga nii o tnunan dha nuqih psaun dha hirang, kiya do snaw ka mduuy paga, Mapa qhuni. Kingal duri ka paga ksun o kngkingal phdagan dha nengalan uqun pdngu brah sapah Truku sbiyaw, pniqan dha 4 papak qhuni ni spgan dha djima ka kraga na.aaji na tucing ka pnhdgan.
S.PHON: paga ksun o snalu dħa sida qħuni apa dħa mdŋu qħuni tħuun dħa misan plaħan. suŋu dħa mħapuj uqun, * ka waħaw paga nii o tnunan dħa nuqiħ psaun dħa ħiɾaŋ, kija do snaw ka mduuj paga, mapa qħuni. kiŋal duɾi ka paga ksun o kŋkiŋal pħdagan dħa nəŋalan uqun pdŋu bɾaħ sapaħ tɾuku sbijaw, pniqan dħa * papak qħuni ni spgan dħa dɟima ka kɾaga na.aaɟi na tuʦiŋ ka pnħdgan.
S.FORM: Paga ksun o snalu dha sida qhuni apa dha mdngu qhuni thuun dha misan plahan. Sungu dha mhapuy uqun, 2 ka wahaw paga nii o tnunan dha nuqih psaun dha hirang, kiya do snaw ka mduuy paga, Mapa qhuni. Kingal duri ka paga ksun o kngkingal phdagan dha nengalan uqun pdngu brah sapah Truku sbiyaw, pniqan dha 4 papak qhuni ni spgan dha djima ka kraga na.aaji na tucing ka pnhdgan.
S.PHON: paga ksun o snalu dħa sida qħuni apa dħa mdŋu qħuni tħuun dħa misan plaħan. suŋu dħa mħapuj uqun, * ka waħaw paga nii o tnunan dħa nuqiħ psaun dħa ħiɾaŋ, kija do snaw ka mduuj paga, mapa qħuni. kiŋal duɾi ka paga ksun o kŋkiŋal pħdagan dħa nəŋalan uqun pdŋu bɾaħ sapaħ tɾuku sbijaw, pniqan dħa * papak qħuni ni spgan dħa dɟima ka kɾaga na.aaɟi na tuʦiŋ ka pnħdgan.
